response.justification: Candidate has ~17 years of solid full-stack software engineering experience with strong craftsmanship (TDD, testing, workshops) and a recent touch of AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators). However, the role targets a Director-level IC Principal Engineer in AI Strategy, requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, cloud-scale architectural leadership, and advisory experience with strategic customers. The resume shows senior-level individual contributor work, not principal/director-level strategic leadership, and AI exposure is minimal and recent rather than a track record of shipped AI products or platforms.
strengths: ~17 years of polyglot full-stack and systems engineering experience
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing tools, public workshops/talks
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform demonstrating end-to-end ownership
concerns: Lacks demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized expertise expected for an AI Strategy role
No evidence of director-level technical leadership, strategic advisory, or org-wide influence
Limited cloud-platform depth (some AWS CDK, Kubernetes) relative to a principal cloud/AI strategist role

key_factors.factor: Missing demonstrated AI expertise and products
No principal/director-level strategic leadership track record
Long, broad engineering experience with strong craftsmanship
